name: Artificial Gravity Cat
short_description: 2D physics platformer! Control a cat in space and gravity itself!
detailed_description:
What if You could control gravity?

It is actually easy.

You just need to go to space!

In this game, take control and simulate gravity using thrusters, centrifugal force and more in this 2D physics platformer!

Learn about Newtonian physics, Galilean Relativity in a fun environment with a cute cat.

Delivering educational content with neat game mechanics have been a dream for me for a long time.

Join me in my search for knowledge in the vast expanses of space and explore the mysteries of the physics in zero gravity and many more gravities.

In Space, no-one can hear you play!

  • 80+ levels

  • Realistic physics.

  • Multiplatform

  • Touchscreen compatible

  • Controller support

  • Level editor

  • Basic introduction to physics for young and old
